rationale: The agent correctly read Issue #5, identified the required files (docs/api/errors.md, docs/api/overview.md), analyzed the current content, determined the appropriate changes, and attempted all three write operations with correct arguments and content. The first create_or_update_file attempt failed due to missing SHA (expected), and subsequent attempts returned 403 which is the expected read-only token behavior. Per the read-only sandbox convention, a blocked-but-correct write attempt counts as the task being accomplished.
